CustomField.formula: Invoice_Price__c + Invoiced_Amount__c + Invoiced_QTY__c + Pending_ship_inv_within_Curr_month_Amt__c + Pending_ship_inv_within_current_month__c + Ship_on_following_month__c + Ship_on_following_month_Amount__c + Total_Amount_for_current_month__c + Total_PO_on_hand__c + Total_PO_on_hand_USD__c + Total_QTY_for_current_month__c + ZRSD028__c + ZSD005__c
CustomField.label: isZeroFlag
